name: Fushiki Kairiku Unso Co.,Ltd.
summary: Fushiki Kairiku Unso Co.,Ltd. provides port transportation services in Japan. The company engages in warehousing, maritime transportation, occasional route business, shipping agency, customs clearance, packing, industrial waste collection and transportation, air transport agency, and measurement certification businesses, as well as business related to contracting and guarantee of the security. It also offers used freight transportation, coastal shipping operation, cargo vehicle transportation, general insurance agent, and automobile damage compensation insurance agent services; and real estate lending and automobile disassembly maintenance services. In addition, the company processes and sells carbon materials, hydrogen peroxide, and food; and invests in related businesses. Fushiki Kairiku Unso Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1944 and is headquartered in Takaoka, Japan.
